results.description: Cargo.toml exists at root
src/lib.rs or src/main.rs exists
src/ directory exists
No nested src/ dirs (src/src/)
benches/ directory exists (if benchmarks declared)
package.name exists
package.version exists
package.edition exists
package.description exists
package.license or package.license-file exists
package.repository exists
package.authors exists
package.rust-version exists
package.keywords exists (libraries)
package.categories exists (libraries)
[lib] path matches existing file
[[bin]] path matches existing file
[[test]] targets declared for tests/ files
[[bench]] targets have harness = false
No undeclared test files
No undeclared bench files
[[example]] targets exist if examples/ present
[[test]] paths resolve to existing files
Package name uses kebab-case
Source files use snake_case naming
No uppercase in source file names
Module file names match mod declarations
Binary names use hyphens or underscores
Test files use correct suffixes (_test.rs, _int_test.rs, _e2e_test.rs, etc.)

Test function name prefix follows location-aware convention: <feature>_<type_kind>_<fn>_<suffix> for tests/<file>.rs; <type_kind>_<fn>_<suffix> for tests/<feature>/<file>.rs (type_kind ∈ {trait,struct,type,enum})

Test function name uses either the conventional test_ prefix or a recognised test-category suffix (_test, _int_test, _e2e_test, _perf_test, _security_test, _stress_test, _load_test, _unit_test, _smoke_test, _contract_test)
Colocated #[cfg(test)] blocks only permitted when testing private methods
No test code in src/ (non-#[cfg(test)])
doc/ or docs/ directory exists (if library)
examples/ directory exists (if library)
No generated files committed (target/)
api/ layer must not import from core/ (L2 must not depend on L3)
saf/ must not re-export from core/ (SAF re-exports from api/ and spi/ only)
Core modules must implement their api traits (impl <Trait> for)
Core items (struct, enum, type, trait, fn, const, static) must use pub(crate) visibility, not bare pub
saf/mod.rs must exist (SAF facade entry point)
saf/ must not define new pub structs (facade layer only re-exports and wires)

violations.message: File contains forbidden pattern '^\s*pub\s+struct\b'
violations.fix_hint: Move type definitions to api/ or core/; saf/ must only re-export and provide factory functions

results.description: lib.rs must delegate public surface to saf/ via pub use
lib.rs must not declare core as public (pub mod core is forbidden)
lib.rs must not declare api as public (pub mod api is forbidden — all layers must be private)
spi/ must not import from core/ (L2 peers must not depend on each other)
When spi/ exists, lib.rs must declare `mod spi` (private, not pub mod)
spi/ must not import from saf/ (L2 must not depend on L3)
core/ must not import from spi/ (L2 peers must not depend on each other)
scripts/ci/ directory exists (if scripts/ present)
scripts/ci/build.sh exists (if scripts/ci/ present)
scripts/ci/test.sh exists (if scripts/ci/ present)
scripts/ci/lint.sh exists (if scripts/ci/ present)
Root contains only allowed entries (whitelist enforcement)
All public functions have corresponding tests (name-based)

violations.message: Public function 'prefixes' has no corresponding test
violations.fix_hint: Add a test function like `fn test_prefixes()` or `fn prefixes_works()`

results.description: Tests use @covers: annotation for explicit 1:1 function linking

violations.message: Public function 'prefixes' has no @covers: annotation in any test
violations.fix_hint: Add `/// @covers: prefixes` before a #[test] function that tests it

violations.message: Public function 'pattern' has no @covers: annotation in any test
violations.fix_hint: Add `/// @covers: pattern` before a #[test] function that tests it

results.description: Trait names must be singular (not plural)
tests/ directory exists at same level as src/
Reports deprecated trait definitions in api/traits.rs for tracking
core/ must not define traits (L2 contains implementations only)
SEA layer directories must not contain crates (no Cargo.toml inside api/, core/, saf/, spi/)
Core module filenames must match their primary struct/trait name (with suffix tolerance)

violations.message: core file 'src\core\configbuilder.rs' types ["DefaultConfigBuilder", "Sec"] don't match filename 'Configbuilder'
violations.fix_hint: Rename file to match primary type, or rename type to include 'Configbuilder'

violations.message: core file 'src\core\substitution.rs' types ["Substituter"] don't match filename 'Substitution'
violations.fix_hint: Rename file to match primary type, or rename type to include 'Substitution'

results.description: Types in core modules must be name-cohesive (SRP enforcement)

violations.message: Type 'Sec' is not cohesive with primary type 'DefaultConfigBuilder'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'Sec' to its own file 'sec.rs'

violations.message: Type 'Server' is not cohesive with primary type 'DefaultSectionLoader'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'Server' to its own file 'server.rs'

violations.message: Type 'Tls' is not cohesive with primary type 'DefaultSectionLoader'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'Tls' to its own file 'tls.rs'

violations.message: Type 'Strict' is not cohesive with primary type 'DefaultSectionLoader'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'Strict' to its own file 'strict.rs'

results.description: Suggest Builder pattern for complex structs (advisory)

violations.message: Struct 'FeatureRecord' has 5 fields (1 optional) - consider Builder pattern
violations.fix_hint: Add 'FeatureRecordBuilder' with fluent setters

results.description: application_type must be defined in project metadata
Project structure must match declared application_type
Integration tests must not use mocking libraries or mock types
Dependencies used in src/ must have integration or e2e test coverage
Dependencies declared in Cargo.toml must be used in src/
CLI projects should use dirs/directories crate for XDG-compliant paths
No hardcoded home directory paths in source code
Test files use suffixes consistent with dependency scope (allowing integration-style *_int_test.rs / *_e2e_test.rs in tests/)
lib.rs must declare gateway as a private module — pub mod and pub(crate) mod are forbidden
Each api/ trait has a corresponding test file in tests/
Each public struct/trait/enum must have its own .rs file (one primary type per file)

violations.message: File contains 4 public types: AllowAllPolicy, PrefixWhitelistPolicy, PatternWhitelistPolicy, CompositePolicy
violations.fix_hint: Move each struct/trait/enum to its own file named after the type (e.g., `Scanner` → `scanner.rs`)

violations.message: File contains 3 public types: PreflightIssueKind, PreflightIssue, PreflightReport
violations.fix_hint: Move each struct/trait/enum to its own file named after the type (e.g., `Scanner` → `scanner.rs`)

violations.message: File contains 6 public types: SectionLoaderImpl, PathValidatorImpl, ConfigBuilderImpl, FeatureRegistry, FeatureSummary, ConfigBuilderImplWithSubstitution
violations.fix_hint: Move each struct/trait/enum to its own file named after the type (e.g., `Scanner` → `scanner.rs`)

results.description: Rust source file names must be nouns (no verb or assertion names like check_exists.rs)
mod.rs must contain only module declarations and re-exports — no struct/impl/fn logic

violations.message: mod.rs contains logic: type definitions (struct/enum/trait/impl) and function definitions
violations.expected: Only module declarations (pub mod) and re-exports (pub use)
violations.fix_hint: Move logic (structs, impls, functions) out of mod.rs into named files; mod.rs should only have `pub mod` and `pub use` statements

results.description: No loose .rs files directly under src/core/ — all code must live in subfolders

violations.message: Loose file 'configbuilder.rs' found directly under src/core/
violations.expected: All code under src/core/ must live in subfolders
violations.fix_hint: Move loose files into appropriate subfolders (e.g., `core/engine.rs` → `core/engine/scanner.rs`)

violations.message: Loose file 'loader.rs' found directly under src/core/
violations.expected: All code under src/core/ must live in subfolders
violations.fix_hint: Move loose files into appropriate subfolders (e.g., `core/engine.rs` → `core/engine/scanner.rs`)

violations.message: Loose file 'substitution.rs' found directly under src/core/
violations.expected: All code under src/core/ must live in subfolders
violations.fix_hint: Move loose files into appropriate subfolders (e.g., `core/engine.rs` → `core/engine/scanner.rs`)

violations.message: Loose file 'validator.rs' found directly under src/core/
violations.expected: All code under src/core/ must live in subfolders
violations.fix_hint: Move loose files into appropriate subfolders (e.g., `core/engine.rs` → `core/engine/scanner.rs`)

results.description: Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)
Every core/ struct with pub/pub(crate) methods must implement a trait defined in api/ (program to the interface)
core/ must not import from spi/ — depend on api/ traits, receive implementations via DI from saf/
core/ must not import from gateway/ — depend on api/ traits, receive implementations via DI from saf/
api/ must not import from core/ — api/ defines abstractions, it must not depend on implementations
api/ must not import from spi/ — api/ defines abstractions, it must not depend on implementations
api/ must not import from gateway/ — api/ defines abstractions, it must not depend on implementations
gateway/ must not import from spi/ — gateway/ depends on saf/ only, not on SPI implementations
Each source file in SEA layers has coverage via inline tests, a matching test file, or a layer-level test file in tests/ — reports per-layer coverage
Every {implementation_layer}/ submodule must have a corresponding {interface_layer}/ submodule defining its types or traits
Config struct methods must be pub(crate), not pub — configs are not for public consumption
Module name must not prefix the struct/trait name (e.g., config::Config not config::ConfigConfig)
Every pub/pub(crate) fn in core/ must have an inline unit test (#[cfg(test)] block with #[test])
Every pub fn in saf/ must have corresponding public-API test coverage (_e2e_test.rs, _int_test.rs, or a layer-level saf_* test)
saf/ must not re-export traits via pub use — wrap trait methods as standalone functions instead
Root must not have both build and bootstrap scripts
src/gateway/ must exist (prerequisite gate for rules 132-133)

violations.message: Directory 'src/gateway' does not exist
violations.fix_hint: Create the directory 'src/gateway'

results.description: gateway/mod.rs must declare pub(crate) mod input

result.reason: Dormant: would fire when prerequisite rule(s) 131 pass

results.description: gateway/mod.rs must declare pub(crate) mod output

result.reason: Dormant: would fire when prerequisite rule(s) 131 pass

results.description: core/ must not import from saf/ — core/ depends only on api/ traits
spi/ must not import from gateway/ — spi/ implements api/ traits only
gateway/ must not import from core/ — gateway/ calls saf/, not core/ directly
saf/ must not import from gateway/ — gateway/ calls saf/, not the reverse
Directory names under src/ must use snake_case
SEA layer files must contain substantive code (not just comments or empty re-exports)
lib.rs must be a real entry point, not a shim with only re-exports
SEA layer mod.rs must not be a crate-level re-export shim
SEA layer directories must meet minimum LOC threshold (api/>10, core/>20, saf/>5)
[lib] and [[bin]] paths must point inside src/
Non-standard [lib] path with src/ present suggests shim directory
Free functions in saf/ or core/ taking an api-defined type as parameter should be methods on that type
Package name must not use SEA layer suffixes as defined in sea_layers config
Workspace root Cargo.toml must not contain [package] — workspace roots must be virtual
Test file prefix must match a source module name, optionally followed by a pub fn name
Weak filesystem patterns — code that produces host-dependent paths (MAIN_SEPARATOR, hardcoded \\, replace-hacks, literal backslashes)
Feature crate must have config/application.toml for runtime configuration

violations.message: File 'config/application.toml' does not exist
violations.fix_hint: Create the file 'config/application.toml'

results.description: service_type must be defined in project metadata
api/traits.rs must contain the primary trait matching service_type
core/ must implement the primary api trait (impl <PrimaryTrait> for)
Every non-orchestrator crate must have a Validator trait in api/traits.rs

violations.fix_hint: Add `pub trait Validator` to src/api/traits.rs or src/api/traits/ and implement it in src/core/validator.rs

results.description: Test functions must not be placeholders (panic!/todo!/unimplemented!/unreachable!/empty body)
saf/ public function signatures must not name types from core/ (signature leak)
All public types (struct, enum, trait, type alias) must be declared under api/ — no other layer is a legal declaration site

results.description: Each pub type/trait in api/ must be in its own standalone file with the file stem matching the snake_case name

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/traits/config_builder.rs' contains no pub type/trait declarations — every file in api/ must contain exactly one public interface item
violations.fix_hint: Add a public type/trait to the file, or move private helpers to a non-api module and delete this file.

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/traits/validator.rs' contains no pub type/trait declarations — every file in api/ must contain exactly one public interface item
violations.fix_hint: Add a public type/trait to the file, or move private helpers to a non-api module and delete this file.

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/types/loader/substitution_policies.rs' contains multiple pub items ["AllowAllPolicy", "PrefixWhitelistPolicy", "PatternWhitelistPolicy", "CompositePolicy"] — each must be in its own file under api/
violations.expected: one pub item per file, with stem matching the item name (e.g. api/allow_all_policy.rs, api/prefix_whitelist_policy.rs, api/pattern_whitelist_policy.rs, api/composite_policy.rs)
violations.fix_hint: Split each pub type/trait into its own file under api/, with the file stem matching the type's snake_case name. Update mod.rs to declare each new module and update consumers' use paths.

violations.message: api/ file 'src/api/types/preflight/preflight_report.rs' contains multiple pub items ["PreflightIssueKind", "PreflightIssue", "PreflightReport"] — each must be in its own file under api/
violations.expected: one pub item per file, with stem matching the item name (e.g. api/preflight_issue_kind.rs, api/preflight_issue.rs, api/preflight_report.rs)
violations.fix_hint: Split each pub type/trait into its own file under api/, with the file stem matching the type's snake_case name. Update mod.rs to declare each new module and update consumers' use paths.

results.description: lib.rs must contain only module declarations and re-exports — no struct/impl/fn/const definitions
Only one architecture.toml location is allowed: either architecture.toml at root or main/config/architecture.toml, not both
Every top-level directory at the workspace root must be a declared workspace member or an ancestor of one
Config files must map to corresponding ConfigBuilder struct names: <name>.toml → <Name>ConfigBuilder
Source files must not contain hardcoded secrets, credentials, or API keys
Project must have a security policy file (SECURITY.md, SECURITY.txt, or .github/SECURITY.md)
Every unsafe block must be preceded by a // SAFETY: comment explaining the invariant
Project must configure dependency vulnerability auditing via deny.toml or cargo audit in CI
all non-mod.rs files in saf/ must be named <last_segment_of_package_name>_svc.rs
Library code must not use println!/eprintln! — use tracing macros (info!, warn!, error!) instead
Source files must not suppress the unused_imports lint via #[allow(unused_imports)]
Cargo dependencies must not use path = "..." pointing outside the workspace root — use git or registry sources instead
When 2+ workspace members share a common parent directory, use a glob pattern (<parent>/*) instead of explicit enumeration
Error types that cross layer boundaries must be declared in api/, not in core/
Error types that cross layer boundaries must be declared in api/, not in core/
include_str! embedding a config file must be paired with a runtime read — use embed as fallback, not sole source
[workspace].exclude must not be used — every crate on disk must be a member or deleted
domain crates must not depend on adapter crates
crate names must not end with generic responsibility suffixes (-core, -utils, -api, -common, -shared, -helpers)
adapter crates must not define public traits — port traits belong in the domain crate
adapter crates must implement at least one domain port trait
SEA layer files must not contain free-standing fn — all functions must be methods on a type (OOP violation)
SEA layer directory names must not contain underscores — use nested directories instead of underscore-concatenated names
saf/ public function return types depend on crate extensibility: if spi/ exists, return `impl Trait` for downstream polymorphism; if spi/ does not exist, return concrete types only (no trait leaks)
api/ layer must not contain `pub struct` outside designated struct homes — flat layout: api/error/, api/types/; domain-grouped layout: api/<domain>/errors/, api/<domain>/types/
api/ must contain trait definitions — either a flat api/traits/ subdirectory or domain-grouped api/<domain>/traits/ directories; at least one must exist
api/ must contain error types — either a flat api/error/ subdirectory or domain-grouped api/<domain>/errors/ directories; at least one must exist
saf/ and api/ layer files must not contain #[cfg(test)] blocks — public-layer tests must live in standalone tests/ files

violations.message: Public-layer file 'src/api/types/loader/substitution_policies.rs' contains a #[cfg(test)] block — saf/ and api/ tests must live in standalone tests/ files
violations.fix_hint: Move the #[cfg(test)] block from 'src/api/types/loader/substitution_policies.rs' to a file in tests/ (e.g. tests/substitution_policies_int_test.rs)

results.description: Production functions must not have stub bodies (todo!(), unimplemented!(), or empty)
No bare .unwrap() calls in production source
No bare .expect() with empty or placeholder message
hygiene
api/ must define at least one domain Error type
api/ must define at least one domain Error type
saf/ must not leak core/ error types in public signatures
Cargo.toml must configure clippy error-handling lints (unwrap_used, expect_used) as deny or warn

violations.message: Cargo.toml missing [lints.clippy] unwrap_used and expect_used
violations.fix_hint:
add: [lints.clippy]
unwrap_used = "deny"
expect_used = "deny"

results.description: spi must be a directory (src/spi/mod.rs) with real code — a flat src/spi.rs file or an empty/comment-only src/spi/mod.rs is invalid SEA structure
api/ root must not contain loose .rs files or mixed-layout directories — only mod.rs at root; no flat traits/types/error/ dirs when domain-grouped layout (api/<domain>/traits/) is active
Source files must not suppress the dead_code lint via #[allow(dead_code)]
spi/ must not define traits (L2 contains implementations only)

violations.message: File contains forbidden pattern '^\s*pub(\s*\(crate\))?\s+trait\b'
violations.fix_hint: Move trait definitions to api/; spi/ must only contain struct implementations of api/ traits
